description: Coupler.io is a data integration and analytics platform that connects business data sources to spreadsheets, BI tools, data warehouses, and AI tools. It also offers an MCP-based interface for connecting Coupler-managed data to AI assistants.
summary: Coupler.io exposes a hosted MCP server at `https://mcp.coupler.io/mcp` authenticated with Coupler-issued OAuth 2.0; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found on the given domain.
